name: Fear The Void
short_description: Something goes wrong during your subway journey home, leaving you in quiet darkness. Can you find your way back to reality? And are you sure you're alone? An atmospheric horror game, that will get you consumed…
detailed_description:
Fear The Void is a philosophical, atmospheric, indie horror game with retro PS1 aesthetics.
A first-person adventure of self-discovery, filled with moral dilemmas, as well as the meaning and meaninglessness of life. Discover existential themes through symbolic horror and hidden truths.

During your subway journey home, something goes wrong, leaving you in quiet darkness.

Can you find your way back to reality? Are you sure you're a̶̗̐l̴̘͑o̴̺͘ń̶̼ê̴̞?


You aren’t the only person adrift in this place. How much of their faculties remain? Do their broken minds hold the secret for redemption? Find out t̴͉̓h̸̖͗e̷͓̎i̴͍͝ṙ̴̝ ̸̢̑p̷̱̍ȃ̴͎s̸̤̊ṱ̸̄ through conversation trees that affect y̵o̵u̶r̴ ̸f̴u̴t̴u̵r̷e̴.

With each decision you make during your time in this realm, you alter the ending of your own story resulting in one of 4 possible outcomes.



Threats lurk all around you. A lumbering creature with too many teeth in all the wrong places. A swift growling beast that you just might escape if you r̶͍̉̏̊u̶̩̘̝̾ń̴̜͝ ̷̧̯̀̑̕f̷͔̫͗a̸̖̣̽͠s̴͉͖̊͗t̵͇͂ ̴̨̨͂́e̴͔͑̉̊ņ̴̫̿o̷̗̐ṳ̷̌g̷̱͎̉̈́h̴͓̻̓̓̆. You must run, hide, solve puzzles, fight, and prove yourself worthy to stay alive.

All while an entity of colossal power a̵̹̫̒̔p̸̙̅̃̓p̸̮̱̔̏̄r̴̳̻̫̂̓o̴͗̆͜á̵̩̜̆̿ͅc̸̮̀h̶̜̾̽e̴̢̳̓s̶̙̔  through the void...

T̷̸̴̥̰̱̞̋͊͛h̷̶̴̠̲͇̜͑̾̕͜e̵̶̴͙͓͎̼͖̞͛̌̓͝ ̷̴̴̬̜̿̾̏͝ͅV̴̸̵̨̞͉͖͕̪͌̽̀o̵̸̴̹̙̻̱̜̓̍̉́͝i̵̶̶͈̭͉̇͗͂̈́̏͝d̸̴̶̞̣̦̜̋͑́̚ ̴̴̵̡̻̥̬͑̔i̸̵̵̢͚̰̼̺̒̀̍s̸̵̴̝̬̖̑́͊̎͋́͜ ̸̸̷̧̦̲̟̏̊͗ć̶̴̴̢̯̰̪͔́̏a̶̴̴̼͕̪̎̈́͒͜l̶̴̸͎͍̖͋̾͝l̵̵̵̡̙̗̠͇͚̏̾̏͗͐͝i̵̷̸̛̛̯͙̇n̴̵̵̰̪̆̈́̌͗̕g̸̶̴͙̯̠̀͊̃ͅ ̵̸̴̮̱̘̣͋̑̊͐̀ẏ̵̴̵͇̤̖̓õ̷̴̶̱̟͓͈̊̂̃u̶̶̴̫̮̝͖͑͌͊̇͠r̷̸̸̲̲̜̹̓̂́̈́ ̷̶̴̜̳͊̅̍ͅn̵̸̵̡̰̪͎̗̓̈́͘å̷̷̴̱͚̳͙̦̝̑͊̎m̷̵̶̛̱̦̜̽̅̓e̴̸̵̟̪̪̪͂̐͠͝

supported_languages: English, Ukrainian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Italian, Polish
